title: Harness Enchantments
description: Add 4 new enchantments to your Ghast Harnesses. Improving the Happy Ghast.
body:
This datapack implements 4 custom enchantments to the Harness item, all four of which can be applied through using the item on an Enchantment Table.

### Fortitude
This enchantment grants the wearer Armour Points, like horse armour does. It can be enchanted up to level 4, giving from 2 points at level 1 to 8 points at level 4.

### Drift
If a player is standing or sitting on a Happy Ghast wearing gear enchanted with Drift, they will be grated up to 4 seconds of the Slow Falling effect. This allows you a small window of time to get back onto the Happy Ghast, or prepare for the descent if you were to fall off.

### Zephyr
This enchantment increases the Happy Ghasts flight speed from an additional 25% boost to 85% at maxed level 5. This enchantment cannot be put on a piece of gear with the Nimbus enchantment.

### Nimbus
Happy Ghasts wearing a Harness enchanted with Nimbus will recieve more than doubled speed when above the cloud level, up to a 135% increase at Nimbus level 3. However the Happy Ghast will have its regular speed below Y level 187 (The level clouds appear in Vanilla). This enchantment cannot be put on a piece of gear with the Zephyr enchantment.
